instructions.instruction: Run ansible-lint even when the playbook runs successfully; NEVER treat a successful run as validation.
NEVER commit playbooks with no_log missing on tasks that handle secrets.
Run yamllint/syntax check before ansible-lint so structural errors surface first.
Use check mode (--check) for a dry run before applying changes to real hosts.
When a linter or Molecule is missing, inform the user, offer the install command, and ask before skipping.
Report each finding with the file and line, mapped to the ansible-lint rule id.
